summary: HOOK_CAPABILITY_MAP typed as Record<string, CapabilityId> forces as any casts — should be Partial
details: {"problem": "Record<string, CapabilityId> tells TS every string key returns CapabilityId, but unknown keys actually return undefined. This forces `as any` casts at hook-dispatch-guard.ts:53 and :57.", "fix": "Change to `Partial<Record<string, CapabilityId>>` so `if (!requiredCapability)` narrows correctly.", "impact": "Eliminates 2 `as any` violations in the capability security boundary.", "found_by": "zoning-board during capability proxy architecture review"}
